zh.Staplegrove, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福
zh.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: 英國薩默塞特斯吉爾蓋特聖 越恩斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Treat於1458年出生在英國薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Richard Treat48歲，母親Joan Buller49歲。他於大約1474年與Mrs Joanna Trott在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世在英國薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福，埋葬在英國薩默塞特斯吉爾蓋特聖 越恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Staplegrove, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福
zh-hans.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: 英国薩默塞特斯吉爾蓋特聖 越恩斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Treat于1458年出生在英国薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Richard Treat48岁，母亲Joan Buller49岁。他于大约1474年与Mrs Joanna Trott在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世在英国薩默塞特斯塔普萊格洛福，埋葬在英国薩默塞特斯吉爾蓋特聖 越恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Treat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Tritt   or   Trede  .

variants.name: Tritt
meanings: German: apparently from Old High German tretan ‘to step’. However, a South German family of this name are descendants of late 16th-century immigrants from Como, Italy, who bore the name de Triddi.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Treat was born in 1458, in Taunton, Somerset, England, his father, Richard Treat, was 48 and his mother, Joan Buller, was 49. He married Mrs Joanna Trott about 1474, in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in Staplegrove, Somerset, England, and was buried in St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, England.

fr.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Treat est né en 1458, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Treat, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Buller, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Joanna Trott environ 1474, à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé à Staplegrove, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Treat è nato il nel 1458 nel Taunton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Richard Treat, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan Buller, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Joanna Trott circa 1474, nel Staplegrove, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel Staplegrove, Somerset, England, e fu sepolto a St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, England.

ja.Taunton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトタウントン
ja.lifeSummary: John Treatが1458年にイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Richard Treatは48歳，母Joan Bullerは49歳であった。約1474年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブでMrs Joanna Trottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスソメルセトスタプレグローブで死去し，イギリスソメルセトスキルガトスト ジョン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: 영국 서머세트 스킬가트 스트 존'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Treat(이)가 1458년 영국 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Treat(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Buller(은)는 49세였다. 그는 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 Mrs Joanna Trott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 서머세트 스타플레그로브에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 스킬가트 스트 존'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Treat nasceu em 1458, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Treat, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Buller, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Joanna Trott aproximadamente 1474, em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.St John's Church, Skilgate, Somerset, En: ст джон'с чурч, скилгэит, сомирсет, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Treat родился в 1458 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Treat было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Buller, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Joanna Trott около 1474 г. в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в местности стаплегров, сомирсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности ст джон'с чурч, скилгэит, сомирсет, Англия.

Se casó con Mrs Joanna Trott aproximadamente 1474, en Staplegrove, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
